stemHtml: The recent experience conditions of a captain assigned to a flight on an aircraft by an operator must not be less than:

options.a: 6 take-offs and 6 landings as pilot at the flight controls on this type of aircraft during the last 90 days.
options.b: 3 take-offs and 3 landings as pilot at the flight controls on this type of aircraft during the last 6 months.
options.c: 6 take-offs and 6 landings as pilot at the flight controls on this type of aircraft during the last 6 months.
options.d: 3 take-offs and 3 landings as pilot at the flight controls on this type of aircraft during the last 90 days.
